name: Cochrane CD009417_pub3 analysis 9: Need for ICU admission
citation: Cochrane review CD009417_pub3 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD009417.pub3). Binary 2x2 data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine REML reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <5e-6 on this real Cochrane dataset. Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
